overview.text_en: In the morning, gather in Rome and set off for the ancient town of Pienza. Along the way, stop for free photos at the cypress-lined lane, then tour Pienza's Piazza Pio II, Pienza Cathedral (exterior) and other sights. After lunch, head to Siena to visit Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, Siena Town Hall (exterior), the Torre del Mangia (exterior) and more. Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena or a comparable 4-star hotel. Note: [Due to crowd-control limits at the Louvre, and especially peak-season restrictions on in-museum guiding, the in-museum guide fee of 10 euros per traveler will be refunded; for Versailles, if there are fewer than 3 people no official guide is provided and an audio guide is used instead.]
overview.text_zh: 上午罗马集合，出发前往皮恩扎古城游览，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，之后游览皮恩扎二世广场，皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点，午餐后出发前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观），田野广场，锡耶纳市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。 夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店 备注：【由于卢浮宫限流、特别是旺季限制讲解员在馆内讲解，届时将退还馆内讲解费10欧元/每位游客， 凡尔赛不足3人无官导讲解，由讲解器代替。 】

accommodation.text_en: Four Points by Sheraton Siena or a comparable 4-star hotel. The hotel sits on a quiet hilltop surrounded by olive groves and gardens, with beautiful scenery ideal for getting close to nature. Guest rooms feature comfortable wood floors, bright design and stylish, tastefully arranged interiors. The hotel also has a refined restaurant serving classic Italian, local and Tuscan cuisine at dinner. An outdoor pool, fitness center and sauna provide an even more relaxing stay.
accommodation.text_zh: 锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店位于安静的山顶，周围环绕着橄榄树和花园，环境优美且适合亲近自然。客房铺设舒适的木质地板，设计明亮，摆设美观的时尚内装，同时酒店配有精致的餐厅，在晚餐时段供应经典的意大利、当地和托斯卡纳美食。酒店的室外泳池、健身中心以及桑拿浴室都为您提供更加放松的入住体验。

highlights.text_en: The pastoral beauty of the Val d'Orcia and the medieval town of Pienza. Close your eyes and you will picture the classic Tuscan scene: blue sky and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypress trees and vines, and finally wheat fields - this is the perfect portrait of the Val d'Orcia. From the walls of the ancient town of Pienza you can look out over the World Heritage landscape of the Val d'Orcia. Sights and activities. The Cypress Lane: a winding country road lined with Italian cypress trees, with its distinctively curving bends and neatly arranged cypresses, has become one of the icons of Tuscan pastoral scenery. In sunlight the cypresses on both sides cast dappled shadows, creating a serene and poetic atmosphere that draws countless photographers and travelers to take pictures. Visit time about 20 minutes. See more. Pienza: Pienza is a town in the Province of Siena in the Tuscany region of central Italy, adjacent to Montalcino. It was the earliest ideal town of the Renaissance, founded by Pope Pius II to renovate his impoverished hometown and serve as a papal summer retreat. In 1996 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage list. The architecture here is Gothic in style and influenced by German style. The town's main square is Piazza Pio II, which contains its principal 15th-century buildings, such as the cathedral (built 1459-1462), the Piccolomini Palace, the Bishop's Palace, and the town hall with its crenellated tower (built 1462). Visit time about 1 hour. See more. Siena: this medieval town is filled with masterpieces by great artists and classical medieval architecture. As you wander Siena's ancient, crisscrossing cobblestone alleys and the deep courtyards hidden throughout, you feel transported to the European Middle Ages of a thousand years ago, and every detail brings a surprise. For centuries the city has kept its complete classical appearance intact, as if time has stood still here since the fourteenth century. Besides its unique scenery and art treasures, Siena maintains a series of traditions, including the making of sweets. On your trip to Siena, do not forget to taste the local specialties - ricciarelli almond biscuits, panforte fruit-and-nut cake, pan pepato peppered-spice nut cake, budini di riso rice pudding, cavallucci walnut biscuits, or copate walnut wafers! Visit time about 2 hours. See more. Piazza del Campo: the Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square for its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the largest surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly across the square stand the Siena Town Hall and its tower; inside the town hall is the civic museum, which houses many paintings of the Sienese School, including the Allegory of Good Government and the Allegory of Bad Government. The tower's full name is the Torre del Mangia; it is Siena's tallest building and the second-tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can climb 55 flights of steps to the top for a sweeping view of the city of Siena. Visit time about 15 minutes. See more. Val d'Orcia: the Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage list in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns; it is a unique meeting of art and nature, rich in historical traces, and its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance to embody the Italian city-states' ideal of good government. Visit time about 10 minutes. See more.
highlights.text_zh: 奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城-皮恩扎 闭上眼睛，你会想象出托斯卡纳的经典景色—蓝天白云，连绵起伏的山丘，点缀着成排的丝柏树和葡萄藤，最后是麦田--这就是Val D'Orcia 的完美写照。从皮恩扎古城的城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。 景点活动 丝柏树小径 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。 游玩时间约20分钟 查看更多 皮恩扎 皮恩扎（Pienza）是意大利中部托斯卡纳大区锡耶纳省的一个市镇，毗邻蒙塔尔奇诺，它是文艺复兴时期最早的理想小镇，由罗马教皇PiusII创立，当时创立的目的是为了翻新给他贫穷的家乡并把此作为罗马教皇的避暑地。1996年，被列入联合国世界遗产名录。这里的建筑呈哥特风，并受德式风格的影响。小镇的主要广场是PiazzaPioII，广场里包含15世纪的主要建筑，如教堂（建于1459-1462）、皮科洛米尼宫（PiccolominiPalace、主教宫、带有锯齿形塔的大会堂（建于1462）。 游玩时间约1小时 查看更多 锡耶纳 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate! 游玩时间约2小时 查看更多 田野广场 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存较大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔，它是锡耶纳较高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。 游玩时间约15分钟 查看更多 奥尔恰谷 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。 游玩时间约10分钟 查看更多

In sunlight the cypresses on both sides cast dappled shadows, creating a serene and poetic atmosphere that draws countless photographers and travelers to take pictures.

Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns; it is a unique meeting of art and nature, rich in historical traces, and its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance to embody the Italian city-states' ideal of good government.
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

overview.text_en: In the morning, head to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) in Pisa's historic-cultural center. Then go to Cinque Terre and, along the Ligurian coastline, tour the beautiful fishing villages perched on the cliffs; afterwards check in at the hotel. Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole or a comparable 4-star hotel. Note: if bad weather, a railway strike, or other factors make it impossible to tour Cinque Terre, the itinerary will automatically change to touring the coastal towns by coach or another means.
overview.text_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场。前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；之后入住酒店。 夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店 或同等4星级酒店 备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en: Hilton Florence Metropole or a comparable 4-star hotel. The Hilton Florence is a modern hotel offering a Tuscan-style experience, with an excellent location giving easy access to Florence's business center and the bustle of the city. From the terrace of the hotel's executive lounge you can enjoy magnificent views of Florence. Each guest room is decorated in a warm, modern style; wood floors and a spacious marble bathroom deliver a high level of comfort.
accommodation.text_zh: 佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店 佛罗伦萨希尔顿酒店是一家体验托斯卡纳风格的现代化酒店，地理位置优越，可前往佛罗伦萨商业中心，享受佛罗伦萨的繁华。酒店行政酒廊的露台上可欣赏到佛罗伦萨的壮丽景色。每间客房均采用温馨的现代风格装饰；木地板和宽敞的大理石浴室可获得较大的舒适度。

highlights.text_en: Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a cliffside paradise. Along the long Mediterranean coastline, stopping at each beautiful fishing village, you watch sun-drenched beaches and waves quietly lapping the rocks, while the colorful houses come closer and closer; your curiosity to see the lovely villages from afar peaks at the moment of arrival. Stepping off the boat and walking on foot through the village alleys, the closer you go the more delightful it becomes. It is like savoring a feast for the eyes in five vivid colors, tasting it little by little, a scene so beautiful it stirs the heart. Sights and activities. The Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior): the Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa in Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of Pisa in Tuscany. It is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, selected as a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. It is said that in 1590 Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment from the Leaning Tower of Pisa, overturning Aristotle's view. Visit time about 30 minutes. See more. Piazza dei Miracoli: also called the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly covered with lawn. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the heart of the city of Pisa, with four major buildings on the square: Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (the bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto cemetery. The ancient city walls and gates are also preserved around the square. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of Pisa (including the cathedral, baptistery, leaning tower and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site. Visit time about 30 minutes. See more. Cinque Terre: Cinque Terre lies along the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in Italy's Liguria region, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name of five cliffside villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that links the five villages, built along the coast - one of the most beautiful hiking routes in the world, about 15-20 km and taking roughly 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other are the mountains, and ahead lie the Italian fishing villages; it is a destination coveted by many hiking enthusiasts. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage list. Visit time about 2 hours. See more.
highlights.text_zh: 意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源 沿地中海的绵长海岸线在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，下得船来，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。 景点活动 比萨斜塔（外观） 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。 游玩时间约30分钟 查看更多 奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli） 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。 游玩时间约30分钟 查看更多 五渔村 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。 游玩时间约2小时 查看更多

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa in Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of Pisa in Tuscany. It is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, selected as a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. It is said that in 1590 Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment from the Leaning Tower of Pisa, overturning Aristotle's view.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also called the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly covered with lawn. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the heart of the city of Pisa, with four major buildings on the square: Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (the bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto cemetery. The ancient city walls and gates are also preserved around the square. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of Pisa (including the cathedral, baptistery, leaning tower and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre lies along the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in Italy's Liguria region, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name of five cliffside villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that links the five villages, built along the coast - one of the most beautiful hiking routes in the world, about 15-20 km and taking roughly 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other are the mountains, and ahead lie the Italian fishing villages; it is a destination coveted by many hiking enthusiasts. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage list.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

overview.text_en: In the morning, head to the birthplace of the Renaissance - Florence - to visit the world's third-largest church, the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (exterior), the Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, and the Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Afterwards proceed to Venice and check in at the hotel. Overnight: voco Venice or the Hilton Venice ambassador hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel.
overview.text_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂（外观）、市政广场，老桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。 夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: voco Venice or the Hilton Venice ambassador hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel. This is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels, with an excellent location and stylish modern design. The guest rooms feature natural tones and modern interiors that offer a comfortable, cozy stay. The hotel provides a generous breakfast, a well-equipped gym, and a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails; the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian cuisine and delicacies.
accommodation.text_zh: 威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提供给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和美食。

highlights.text_en: Florence in its glorious prime, the brilliant starlight of the Renaissance. In Florence, the world's capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Search for the soul of the Renaissance among blue skies and white clouds, brightly colored walls, dark green shutters and deep red rooftops; feel the timeless Renaissance in the streets and lanes, the squares and churches, the museums and galleries. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, 'The poetic spirit of Dante Alighieri and the painterly spirit of da Vinci still drift over Florence, still continuing to seek out the people and events of the European Renaissance...' Sights and activities. Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter): there are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few are so graceful. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, interprets the classicism, elegance and freedom championed by the Renaissance to the fullest; no wonder it is named 'Saint Mary of the Flower.' The site of Santa Maria del Fiore was originally that of the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the building of the new church, which took 175 years to complete. Visit time about 30 minutes. See more. Piazza della Signoria: the Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum and has been the center of the city's political life for centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture David, and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and many cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore lies just to its north. Visit time about 30 minutes. See more. Ponte Vecchio: the Ponte Vecchio over the Arno River, also known as the Old Bridge, was built in 1345 and is one of Europe's earliest large-span segmental-arch bridges. It is said that Dante met the young Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into the Divine Comedy. Over several centuries it has withstood floods, social upheaval and wars and remained standing. It is one of Florence's famous landmarks. Visit time about 15 minutes. See more. Piazza Santa Croce: the Piazza Santa Croce is in the center of Florence, Italy, an important public space that has continued since the Renaissance. At the heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian luminaries such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring. Around the square are many cafes and restaurants serving authentic Italian cuisine, an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. The Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural events and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances draw large audiences. The square's open space is perfect for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, taking in Florence's unique atmosphere. Visit time about 1 hour. See more.
highlights.text_zh: 佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀 在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利·但丁的诗魂、达·芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....'' 景点活动 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入） 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。 游玩时间约30分钟 查看更多 市政广场 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。 游玩时间约30分钟 查看更多 维奇奥桥 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。 游玩时间约15分钟 查看更多 圣十字广场 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。 游玩时间约1小时 查看更多

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）

overview.text_en: In the morning, visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the splendid Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings built upon the water, together with the winding water lanes, leave Venice's romantic charm lingering long in the mind. Afterwards proceed to the fashion capital, Milan. Overnight: Royal Garden Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel.
overview.text_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。之后前往时尚之都——米兰。 夜宿：皇家花园酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Royal Garden Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel. The hotel is set in a lush garden with fountains, palm trees and olive trees, blending classic elegance with modern style - a pleasant and relaxing urban retreat. From the hotel it is a short walk to a nearby large shopping center. The guest rooms are spacious and elegant, with large marble bathrooms fitted with bathtubs. The buffet breakfast is rich and varied, the Captain's Bar serves drinks and snacks all day, and the hotel has the glass-domed Blue Crab Grill restaurant serving international cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh: 皇家花园酒店 或同等级4星级酒店 酒店坐落在郁郁葱葱的花园中，花园内有喷泉、棕榈树和橄榄树，将经典优雅与现代风格融为一体，是一处令人愉悦而轻松的城市度假胜地。酒店可步行至附近的大型商业中心；酒店的客房宽敞而优雅，设有带浴缸的大型大理石浴室，自助早餐丰盛多样，Captain's Bar 全天供应饮料和小吃，酒店设有玻璃圆顶的 Blue Crab Grill 餐厅，供应国际美食。

highlights.text_en: The world's most beautiful Venice, the 'Pearl of the Adriatic,' still dazzling and radiant. Venice, one of the major centers of the Renaissance, is made up of 118 small islands joined together by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the 'City on Water,' the 'City of a Hundred Isles' and the 'City of Bridges.' Here are one of the world's most beautiful squares, St. Mark's Square; the beautiful Grand Canal; the phoenix-reborn La Fenice opera house; the melancholy Bridge of Sighs of which Xu Zhimo wrote; and breathtakingly beautiful arcades. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting and the filming location of many a movie. Her unique charm leaves every visitor enchanted and reluctant to leave. Sights and activities. St. Mark's Basilica (exterior): known simply as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the heart of Venice. First built in AD 829 and rebuilt in 1043-1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe, a classic work of Venetian architectural art, and at the same time a treasury rich in artworks. Visit time about 15 minutes. See more. Doge's Palace (exterior): this is a museum on Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory is gathered. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons; on the way to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, and through its small openings you can look out, rather than being looked at by the many people on the bridge opposite. You may take photos inside, as long as you do not use a flash. Visit time about 15 minutes. See more. Venice Bridge of Sighs (exterior): the Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route by which the court escorted condemned prisoners to the prison. Its design is in the early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, covered by a vault on top and tightly enclosed, with only two small windows on the canal side. After a prisoner had been judged in the Doge's Palace, the serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and as they crossed this airtight bridge they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows; from then on they lost their freedom and involuntarily uttered sighs. It is said that lovers who kiss beneath the bridge will be together forever, and the film 'A Little Romance' was shot here. Visit time about 10 minutes. See more. St. Mark's Square: the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon 'the most beautiful drawing room in Europe.' Three sides of the square are surrounded by magnificent palaces, and on the east side rise the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times it has been the center of Venice's political, religious and traditional festival public life. Visit time about 30 minutes. See more.
highlights.text_zh: 世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目 威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。 景点活动 圣马可大教堂（外观） 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。 游玩时间约15分钟 查看更多 总督府（外观） 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。 游玩时间约15分钟 查看更多 威尼斯叹息桥（外观） 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。 游玩时间约10分钟 查看更多 圣马可广场 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。 游玩时间约30分钟 查看更多

First built in AD 829 and rebuilt in 1043-1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe, a classic work of Venetian architectural art, and at the same time a treasury rich in artworks.

Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons; on the way to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, and through its small openings you can look out, rather than being looked at by the many people on the bridge opposite. You may take photos inside, as long as you do not use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route by which the court escorted condemned prisoners to the prison. Its design is in the early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, covered by a vault on top and tightly enclosed, with only two small windows on the canal side. After a prisoner had been judged in the Doge's Palace, the serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and as they crossed this airtight bridge they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows; from then on they lost their freedom and involuntarily uttered sighs. It is said that lovers who kiss beneath the bridge will be together forever, and the film 'A Little Romance' was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: The central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon 'the most beautiful drawing room in Europe.' Three sides of the square are surrounded by magnificent palaces, and on the east side rise the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times it has been the center of Venice's political, religious and traditional festival public life.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, freely visit Milan's iconic landmark, the Milan Cathedral (exterior), and one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon, head to Zurich to tour the Grossmunster (exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse, and stroll along the Limmat River. Overnight: H+ Hotel Zurich (Limmattal area) or a comparable 4-star hotel.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观），欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊。 下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观），苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街、漫步利马特河边。 夜宿：苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: H+ Hotel Zurich (Limmattal area) or a comparable 4-star hotel. The hotel is set in the scenic heart of the Limmattal, a modern city residence right next to one of Switzerland's larger shopping centers. The hotel has a bar, and the guest rooms are spacious and tidy, with attractive parquet floors and modern furniture, large wardrobes and many little touches that make life easier. The hotel offers a range of buffet or continental breakfasts. The lush valleys, rolling hills and the winding Limmat River around the hotel provide a comfortable, natural stay.
accommodation.text_zh: 苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店坐落在风景秀丽的利马塔尔中心地带，现代化的城市住宅，紧邻瑞士较大的购物中心，酒店配备酒吧，客房宽敞整洁，拥有漂亮的镶木地板和现代家具、大衣柜和许多让生活更轻松的小创意。酒店提供各类自助或欧陆式早餐。酒店周边绿意盎然的山谷、连绵起伏的丘陵和蜿蜒的利马特河，为您提供舒适自然的入住体验。

highlights.text_en: Check in at the filming location of 'Crash Landing on You' and encounter romantic Zurich. The opening of the TV drama 'Crash Landing on You' was filmed at Lindenhof Park in Zurich's old town; as the drama begins, the perfect shot of the two protagonists passing each other is frozen in time. With the Limmat River as foreground, the park offers wonderful views of Zurich. The twin-towered building that flashes by in the drama is precisely the Grossmunster, Zurich's recognized landmark. Zurich's old town is also an experience not to be missed, gathering traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookshops and flower stalls, as well as jewelry and fashion boutiques; stroll the old town and wander from street to street. Sights and activities. Milan Cathedral (exterior): although its name Duomo means 'dome,' the Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, the Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as Italy's magnificent Gothic architecture, hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and thousands of statues are carved on its white marble facade. The interior space is vast, and sunlight filtering through the beautiful stained-glass windows fills it with a hazy light and a solemn religious atmosphere. The crypt of the church still preserves the remains of the Church of San Tecla that stood on the original site. Visit time about 25 minutes. See more. Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II: this is a magnificent shopping mall, though most visitors come here for sightseeing. Under the central arcade is the Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the very best in Milan; in particular the window displays are updated daily, and just standing outside admiring them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele is filled with many fine restaurants, cafes and shops. Visit time about 45 minutes. See more. Bahnhofstrasse: Bahnhofstrasse (also called Station Street) is one of Europe's longer shopping avenues and one of the most expensive shopping avenues in the world; more precisely it is the truly priceless heart of Zurich, lined with luxury brands from around the world and rows of private banks. Walking along Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless visitors feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet are stored gold bars said to be among the largest quantities in the world, making many too excited to move their feet; immersed in it, you can clearly feel wealth, luxury and a leisurely air permeating the atmosphere. Visit time about 30 minutes. See more. Lake Zurich: Lake Zurich is 4 km wide and about 39 km long, its piers crowded with yachts of all kinds, like a club for the wealthy. One end of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center; white swans and wild ducks are seen everywhere on the lake, leisurely and free, a harmonious scene. The north bank of Lake Zurich is where the wealthy live, dubbed the 'Gold Coast,' while the south bank is called the 'Silver Coast.' At the end of Bahnhofstrasse lies Lake Zurich. As one of 'the world's most livable cities,' the life of the true people of Zurich is everywhere imbued with peace and leisure. Visit time about 15 minutes. See more. Grossmunster (exterior): the Grossmunster is one of Zurich's three main churches in Switzerland (the other two are the Fraumunster and another). Located near the bank of the Limmat River, it was begun around 1100 and inaugurated about 1220. This church, facing the Fraumunster across the river, played a pivotal role in the 16th-century Swiss Reformation; the theological faculty of the University of Zurich and the Museum of the Reformation are both established here. The stained-glass windows inside the church are masterpieces of the Swiss modern art master Giacometti. Visit time about 15 minutes. See more.
highlights.text_zh: 打卡《爱的迫降》取景地，邂逅浪漫的苏黎世 《爱的迫降》电视剧片头取景地就是位于苏黎世老城的林登霍夫公园，正片开始时，定格了两人擦身而过的完美的画面。公园以利马特河为前景可以观赏到苏黎世的美妙景色。剧中闪现的双塔建筑正是苏黎世大教堂，是苏黎世公认的地标建筑。苏黎世老城区也是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰、时尚精品，漫步于老城区，在每个街道里走走停停。 景点活动 米兰大教堂（外观） 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。 游玩时间约25分钟 查看更多 埃马努埃莱二世长廊 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱长廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。 游玩时间约45分钟 查看更多 班霍夫大街 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。 游玩时间约30分钟 查看更多 苏黎世湖 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。 游玩时间约15分钟 查看更多 苏黎世大教堂（外观） 苏黎世大教堂(Grossmünster)是瑞士苏黎世的3座主要教堂之一(另外两座是苏黎世圣母大教堂和)。教堂位于利马特河河岸附近，始建于1100年前后，约1220年揭幕。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。 游玩时间约15分钟 查看更多

The interior space is vast, and sunlight filtering through the beautiful stained-glass windows fills it with a hazy light and a solemn religious atmosphere. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele is filled with many fine restaurants, cafes and shops.

overview.text_en: In the morning, set off for Lucerne to enjoy the lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, hear the Lion Monument tell of that chapter of Swiss loyalty and resolve, and see sights such as the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower. Then head to the town of Iseltwald to tour Lake Brienz and the town's scenery. In the afternoon, proceed to Interlaken, the town at the foot of the 'roof of Europe' - the Jungfrau. Overnight: Solis Sigriswil (snow-mountain and lake-view hotel) or a comparable 4-star hotel.
overview.text_zh: 上午出发前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角型水塔等景点；之后前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光；下午前往欧洲屋脊-“少女峰”山脚下的小镇-因特拉肯。 夜宿：锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Solis Sigriswil (snow-mountain and lake-view hotel) or a comparable 4-star hotel. The hotel sits in the mountain gorge beside the panoramic bridge of Sigriswil; all guest rooms are decorated in elegant Swiss country style, and the views meet every expectation of Switzerland, with rooms enjoying views of Lake Thun, the surrounding mountains or the village of Sigriswil. Sitting in the hotel restaurant gazing at the emerald waters of Lake Thun, with the snow mountains quietly reflected, you feel as if in a painting, able to fully enjoy the paradise-like beauty of Switzerland.
accommodation.text_zh: 锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店位于锡格里斯维尔（Sigriswil）全景桥旁边的山涧，所有的客房装饰为瑞士乡村典雅风格，酒店景观满足对瑞士的想象，客房客房享有图恩湖或周围群山或锡格里斯维尔村景致。坐在酒店的餐厅远眺碧绿的图恩湖水，宁静地倒影的雪山，恍然如画中，让人尽情欣赏瑞士世外桃源般的美好景致。

highlights.text_en: The town of Iseltwald beneath the snow mountains. As the filming location of the grand-reunion ending of 'Crash Landing on You,' where the drama's hero and heroine spent 'the two happiest weeks of the year,' the protagonists' impossibly sweet paradise and the transcendent beauty of Lake Brienz seem tailor-made for the drama. The heavenly lake and mountain scenery, the unfiltered beauty of Lake Brienz - if there is an earthly paradise, it must be in Iseltwald; the peace of a quiet life is nothing more than this. Sights and activities. The town of Iseltwald: located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Express passes through here. Surrounded by mountains and lush green grass, the quaint village is scattered along the shore of Lake Brienz, like a paradise far from the madding crowd. Visit time about 30 minutes. See more. Lucerne: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland, in the German-speaking part of the country. Nestled among mountains and water, Lucerne possesses a beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance halls and mansions, and century-old shops, long streets and ancient lanes - all abound. The lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the city's beautiful sights in a dreamlike yet real way, making it a remarkable pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful towns. Since the 19th century it has drawn many royals, nobles and men of letters to visit and reside, and artists have found boundless artistic inspiration in Lucerne. Visit time about 2 hours. See more. Lake Lucerne: this lake has a winding shape, and together with the surrounding mountains it forms the classic 'lake-and-mountain' scenery that attracts large numbers of visitors. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's Piano Sonata No. 14 as the moonlight over Lake Lucerne, and so the piece acquired the title 'Moonlight' - although this was not Beethoven's intention. Visit time about 15 minutes. See more. Lion Monument: this dying lion statue was carved into the natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. The lion, 10 meters long and over 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground with a broken spear thrust into its shoulder, beside a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms. The statue commemorates the 786 Swiss mercenaries who died to the last man on 10 August 1792 protecting the family of Louis XVI in the Tuileries Palace in Paris; an inscription below the statue describes the course of the event. In those days, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, driven by the need to make a living, went to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and brave in battle, but honor and money could not mask the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, keeping only the guard serving the Catholic Holy See - the famous Swiss Guard. Owing to their famed loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served right up to the present day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and called the 'dying lion of Lucerne' 'the most mournful and moving stone in the world.' Visit time about 15 minutes. See more.
highlights.text_zh: 雪山下的龙疆小镇 作为“爱的迫降”大团圆结局的取景地，剧中男女主角“一年中幸福的两周”都在这里度过，主角甜到齁的世外桃源，超然于世的龙疆湖美景，就像是为该剧量身定做的。人间天堂般的湖光山色，无滤镜的龙疆湖美景，如果有世外桃源，那一定在龙疆，岁月静好也不过如此。 景点活动 龙疆小镇 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。 游玩时间约30分钟 查看更多 卢塞恩 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。 游玩时间约2小时 查看更多 卢塞恩湖 这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。 游玩时间约15分钟 查看更多 狮子纪念碑 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。 游玩时间约15分钟 查看更多

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Express passes through here. Surrounded by mountains and lush green grass, the quaint village is scattered along the shore of Lake Brienz, like a paradise far from the madding crowd.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland, in the German-speaking part of the country. Nestled among mountains and water, Lucerne possesses a beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance halls and mansions, and century-old shops, long streets and ancient lanes - all abound. The lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the city's beautiful sights in a dreamlike yet real way, making it a remarkable pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful towns. Since the 19th century it has drawn many royals, nobles and men of letters to visit and reside, and artists have found boundless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: This lake has a winding shape, and together with the surrounding mountains it forms the classic 'lake-and-mountain' scenery that attracts large numbers of visitors. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's Piano Sonata No. 14 as the moonlight over Lake Lucerne, and so the piece acquired the title 'Moonlight' - although this was not Beethoven's intention.
attractions.text_zh: 这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: This dying lion statue was carved into the natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. The lion, 10 meters long and over 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground with a broken spear thrust into its shoulder, beside a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms. The statue commemorates the 786 Swiss mercenaries who died to the last man on 10 August 1792 protecting the family of Louis XVI in the Tuileries Palace in Paris; an inscription below the statue describes the course of the event. In those days, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, driven by the need to make a living, went to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and brave in battle, but honor and money could not mask the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, keeping only the guard serving the Catholic Holy See - the famous Swiss Guard. Owing to their famed loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served right up to the present day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and called the 'dying lion of Lucerne' 'the most mournful and moving stone in the world.'
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

overview.text_en: In the morning, visit Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun, known as the 'left eye' and 'right eye' of God. You may freely tour Hoheweg and the Hohematte, quiet villages shaded by green trees and dotted among the mountains and waters, where people and nature merge into one; or you may optionally take the Jungfrau panoramic cable car to the summit - the Top of Europe, Europe's highest railway station - to the Sphinx Observation Deck and the Aletsch Glacier; or you may optionally visit First, a Swiss alpine adventure town, to tour the First Cliff Walk. Then check in at the Novotel Geneva Port (Annemasse). Overnight: Novotel Geneva Port (Annemasse) or Crowne Plaza or a comparable 4-star hotel.
overview.text_zh: 上午参观有上帝左眼与右眼之称的布里恩茨湖和图恩湖中央的因特拉肯，可选自由游览何维克街，荷黑马特，宁静的村庄，绿树掩映，点缀在山水之间，人与自然浑然一体；或者自费选择少女峰全景缆车登顶——Top of Europe欧洲较高的火车站，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”及阿莱奇冰川；或者自费前往瑞士高山探险小镇菲斯特，游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道。随后入住安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店。 夜宿：安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Geneva Port (Annemasse) or Crowne Plaza or a comparable 4-star hotel. The Novotel opened in 2020 and is a comfortable-class business hotel under the Accor group, with decor in harmony with its natural surroundings. Inspired by innovative New York hotel concepts, it includes a cafe and bakery area open to both hotel guests and the public. The hotel has a restaurant serving healthy seasonal cuisine. At the Rooftop 46 bar on the 8th floor, overlooking the Alps and the Jura mountains, you can enjoy happy hour.
accommodation.text_zh: 安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店 诺富特酒店于2020年开业，是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店的装饰与其自然环境相协调。受到纽约创新酒店概念的启发，它包括一个向酒店客人和公众开放的咖啡厅和面包店区。酒店设有一间餐厅，提供健康的时令美食。在酒店8 层的 Rooftop 46 酒吧俯瞰阿尔卑斯山和侏罗山脉，享受快乐时光。

highlights.text_en: Between two lakes as clear as gemstones, experience the marvel of being a traveler within a painting. God especially favored Lake Thun and Lake Brienz in the Bernese Oberland, leaving here lake waters as beautiful and precious as eyeballs. Towns and villages are scattered all around; from near to far, the eye is filled with lush, dripping greenery, with the snow mountains standing tall in the distance and sunlight tickling the tip of one's nose. The changing of the four seasons does not diminish this idyllic beauty by a single degree - between the mountains and waters, it is all good times.
highlights.text_zh: 宝石般澄澈的两湖之间，体验人在画中游的胜景 上帝特别眷顾伯尔尼高地上的图恩湖和布里恩茨湖，将如眼珠般美丽而珍贵的湖水留在这里。小镇和村庄星罗棋布，由近及远是满眼苍翠欲滴的绿意，远处的雪山挺拔，阳光在人的鼻子上挠痒痒，四季的变化没有让这田园美景减色一分，山水之间都是好时光。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is home to the famous postcard photo spot photographers adore, the Swiss 'dream slope,' and is also the alpine town one must pass through to visit the Jungfrau. Together with First, the Jungfrau, Wengen and others, it forms one of the more magnificent and beautiful scenic lines of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing destination, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts; the lakeside, green grass, waterfalls, dairy cows and snow mountains together make this an enchanting town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头非常爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)等一起组成了少女峰地区较为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald-First draws visitors from all directions to admire the magnificent scenery of the north face of the Eiger. Standing on the famous First Cliff Walk, anyone will immediately feel they are standing at the top of the world. The First Cliff Walk is located at the summit of First and offers a unique panorama of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau lies some twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters; it is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow year-round, while the foot of the mountain is lush with green grass and beautiful scenery, making it a well-known Swiss destination for sightseeing and outdoor sports. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: The Hohematte is the green-space square in the center of Interlaken, the famous Swiss tourist town. This green space was once the garden of a monastery, and now no buildings of any kind are allowed to be built on it, in order to prevent damage to this beautiful landscape. It is the best place to gaze at the Jungfrau; on the vast green there is a fountain, dotted with many benches, so it is also a good place for a stroll. The Hohematte is also a landing site for paragliding; there is a reception point at the edge of the lawn, and after paying, staff will take visitors to the nearby mountain for free paragliding, from where one can admire the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the sky.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

overview.text_en: In the morning, tour the 'flower bridge' area beside the hotel, where Geneva's various local delicacies and specialty shops gather, and visit Geneva's old town, the Lake Geneva area, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau (Grand Fountain) and other sights. In the afternoon, travel back to Paris by coach. Overnight: Mercure Paris or Novotel or a comparable 4-star hotel.
overview.text_zh: 上午游览位于酒店旁的“花桥”区域，这里云集则日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店，参观日内瓦老城，日内瓦湖区，花钟和大喷泉等景点；下午乘车返回巴黎。 夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Mercure Paris or Novotel or a comparable 4-star hotel. The Mercure or Novotel Paris is a comfortable-class four-star hotel under the Accor group, located near large shopping malls for the convenience of guests dining and shopping. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it offers a comfortable stay, drawing on the brand's distinctive features: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, a distinctive hotel style deeply rooted in local character, and an enthusiastic management team.
accommodation.text_zh: 巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店 巴黎美居或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型四星酒店，酒店位于大型商超附近，方便客人有餐购物，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en: Geneva's old town. The upper town on the shore of Lake Geneva, the scenic Lake Geneva and the majestic Alps form a poetic, idyllic landscape; the beautiful scenery of the two countries' borders changes and interweaves continually along Lake Geneva - on one side France's Evian and Annemasse, on the other Geneva's old town. The entire lake area is listed as a World Heritage Site, with one human-heritage site after another and exceptionally well-preserved medieval towns; the roads are inlaid with cobblestones, and every town and small city has several fountains. Traditional house architecture and modern, novel shops weave together into one marvelous experience after another. Sights and activities. Lake Geneva: Lake Geneva, also known as Lake Leman, straddles Switzerland and France and is an important lake of Western Europe, as well as a famous scenic and resort area. By day you can take a boat to tour Lake Geneva, and by night be intoxicated by the shimmering neon along the shore; luxury cruise ships often hold concerts or dances on the lake. You can take a boat to take in the beautiful scenery along the shore of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, the snow mountains and the blue sky merge into one. Visit time about 20 minutes. See more. Jet d'Eau (Geneva fountain): the Grand Fountain is located on Lake Geneva near the English Garden and is one of Geneva's most representative sights. The Grand Fountain resembles a column of water spouted by a whale, 140 meters high with a water flow of 500 liters; its spectacular sight can be seen from far away from the city center. At night you may also have the chance to see the Grand Fountain illuminated by lights, even more magnificent. Visit time about 15 minutes. See more. Flower Clock: the Flower Clock is a famous sight in Geneva. Switzerland is known as the 'Garden Country' and at the same time the 'Land of Watches,' and what is even more wonderful is that Switzerland's skilled craftsmen have ingeniously combined the beauty of flowers with the craft of watchmaking, creating the original 'Flower Clock.' Visit time about 15 minutes. See more. Geneva old town: the upper town on the hillside on the right bank of the Rhone is called the upper town by local residents because of its higher elevation. It is not only a gathering place for churches and historic sites, but also has many small and lovely antique shops among the winding alleys; the former residence of Rousseau, the European Enlightenment thinker, is also located within the old town. Visit time about 40 minutes. See more.
highlights.text_zh: 日内瓦古城区 日内瓦湖畔的上城区，风光旖旎的日内瓦湖和雄伟的阿尔卑斯山，构成的诗意田园风光，两国国境秀丽风景沿日内瓦湖不断变化交错、一会是法国依云安娜玛斯一边是日内瓦的旧城，整个湖区被列为世界遗产，一座又一座的人类遗产以及保护得十分完好的中世纪小城，路上镶嵌着一块块的石板，每个小镇、小城都就有多处喷泉。传统的房屋建筑和摩登新颖的店家，交织成一处处美轮美奂的奇妙体验。 景点活动 日内瓦湖 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。 游玩时间约20分钟 查看更多 日内瓦喷泉 大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦较具代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。 游玩时间约15分钟 查看更多 花钟 花钟是日内瓦著名景点。瑞士号称“花园之国”，同时又是“钟表之乡”，而更奇妙的是瑞士的能工巧匠绝妙地将花卉之美同钟表的制造工艺完美地结合起来，别出心裁地创造出了“花钟”。 游玩时间约15分钟 查看更多 日内瓦旧城区 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。 游玩时间约40分钟 查看更多

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lake Leman, straddles Switzerland and France and is an important lake of Western Europe, as well as a famous scenic and resort area. By day you can take a boat to tour Lake Geneva, and by night be intoxicated by the shimmering neon along the shore; luxury cruise ships often hold concerts or dances on the lake. You can take a boat to take in the beautiful scenery along the shore of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, the snow mountains and the blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Grand Fountain is located on Lake Geneva near the English Garden and is one of Geneva's most representative sights. The Grand Fountain resembles a column of water spouted by a whale, 140 meters high with a water flow of 500 liters; its spectacular sight can be seen from far away from the city center. At night you may also have the chance to see the Grand Fountain illuminated by lights, even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh: 大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦较具代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en: The Flower Clock is a famous sight in Geneva. Switzerland is known as the 'Garden Country' and at the same time the 'Land of Watches,' and what is even more wonderful is that Switzerland's skilled craftsmen have ingeniously combined the beauty of flowers with the craft of watchmaking, creating the original 'Flower Clock.'
attractions.text_zh: 花钟是日内瓦著名景点。瑞士号称“花园之国”，同时又是“钟表之乡”，而更奇妙的是瑞士的能工巧匠绝妙地将花卉之美同钟表的制造工艺完美地结合起来，别出心裁地创造出了“花钟”。

attractions.text_en: The upper town on the hillside on the right bank of the Rhone is called the upper town by local residents because of its higher elevation. It is not only a gathering place for churches and historic sites, but also has many small and lovely antique shops among the winding alleys; the former residence of Rousseau, the European Enlightenment thinker, is also located within the old town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

overview.text_en: In the morning, visit the Louvre Museum, the pride of France, where a curator-guide of the French national museum will give an in-depth, theme-selected explanation. In the afternoon, head to Notre-Dame de Paris, the Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, then take a Seine River cruise to visit Les Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), the Place de la Concorde and other sights, touring the central Paris attractions all day. Overnight: Mercure Paris or Novotel or a comparable 4-star hotel. Note: [Due to crowd-control limits at the Louvre, and especially peak-season restrictions on in-museum guiding, the in-museum guide fee of 10 euros per traveler will be refunded.]
overview.text_zh: 上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，届时、将由法兰西国家馆讲解师，精选主题深度讲解； 下午前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛，埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地参观，全天游览巴黎市中心景点。 夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店 备注：【由于卢浮宫限流、特别是旺季限制讲解员在馆内讲解，届时将退还馆内讲解费10欧元/每位游客】

accommodation.text_en: Mercure Paris or Novotel or a comparable 4-star hotel. The Mercure or Novotel Paris is a comfortable-class four-star hotel under the Accor group, located near large shopping malls for the convenience of guests dining and shopping. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it offers a comfortable stay, drawing on the brand's distinctive features: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, a distinctive hotel style deeply rooted in local character, and an enthusiastic management team.
accommodation.text_zh: 巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店 巴黎美居或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型四星酒店，酒店位于大型商超附近，方便客人有餐购物，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en: Take a Seine River cruise and feel the gentleness and romance of Paris. Boarding the famous 'bateaux mouches' with their transparent cabins, you sail along the Seine that blends together so many sights; the 3.2-kilometer voyage of about 1 hour passes famous sights such as Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Elysees and the Ile de la Cite. On the Seine you feel Paris's romantic night, the beautiful scenery and the wonderful music - it is called 'a must-do, in-depth tour of Paris.' Sights and activities. Ile de la Cite: if the Louvre witnessed the glory of the Gauls, then the Ile de la Cite, Notre-Dame de Paris and the Paris City Hall wrote the indissoluble bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans there would be no Ile de la Cite; without the Ile de la Cite there would be no Paris as it is today. Visit time about 30 minutes. See more. Notre-Dame de Paris: the Cathedral of Notre-Dame de Paris sits on the Ile de la Cite in the center of Paris and is the cathedral of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. The church is Gothic in style, and visitors can climb the towers; although you will not meet the 'Hunchback of Notre-Dame,' you can see the 17th-century great bell, get up close to the chimeras on the church's exterior walls, and look down on the beautiful scenery of the Ile de la Cite and the Seine. Visit time about 30 minutes. See more. Louvre: it is one of the world's oldest museums and a world-renowned treasury of art. The Louvre building is U-shaped, divided into a new and an old part. The glass pyramid entrance in front of the Louvre was designed by the Chinese-American master architect I.M. Pei. Here are treasured more than 400,000 art treasures, of which about 35,000 are on long-term display, encompassing artworks from ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria and Rome to medieval Europe and the various countries of the East - truly an outstanding palace of art in human history. The itinerary includes standard individual-visitor tickets (without a Chinese-language audio guide). Visit time about 1 hour 30 minutes. See more. Champ de Mars: the Champ de Mars is a large strip-shaped park located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, France, between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the Ecole Militaire (Paris military school) to its southeast. Before the latter half of the eighteenth century, this was an abandoned open ground; it was only after the military school was established in 1765 that its status gradually rose, its main purpose then being to serve as a place for military training. During the French Revolution, on 17 July 1791, a massacre and bloodshed once took place here. Later France used this venue to host several World's Fairs and the 1900 Olympic Games. Visit time about 15 minutes. See more. Eiffel Tower (exterior): the Eiffel Tower is one of the symbols of Paris, affectionately called by the French the 'Iron Lady.' If Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the landmark of modern Paris. Visit time about 15 minutes. See more. Seine River cruise: boarding the famous 'bateaux mouches' with their transparent cabins, you sail along the Seine that blends together so many sights; the 3.2-kilometer voyage of about 1 hour passes famous sights such as Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Elysees and the Ile de la Cite. On the Seine you feel Paris's romantic night, the beautiful scenery and the wonderful music - it is called 'a must-do, in-depth tour of Paris.' Visit time about 1 hour. See more.
highlights.text_zh: 乘塞纳河游船，感受巴黎的温柔与浪漫 乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西黛岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》 景点活动 西岱岛 如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。 游玩时间约30分钟 查看更多 巴黎圣母院 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西堤岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格，游客可以登上塔楼参观，虽然遇不到“钟楼怪人”，但却能看到17世纪的大钟、近距离接触教堂外壁上的神兽、俯瞰西岱岛与塞纳河的美丽风光。 游玩时间约30分钟 查看更多 卢浮宫 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着40余万件艺术珍品、其中长期展出约3.5万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上杰出的艺术殿堂。 行程包含普通散客门票（无中文讲解器）。 游玩时间约1小时30分钟 查看更多 战神广场 战神广场是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔、以及在其东南方的巴黎军校之间。 在十八世纪下半叶之前，这是一块被遗弃的空地，直到军事学校在1765年建立，它的地位才逐渐提升，当时主要的目的是用来作为军事训练的场所。在法国大革命时期的1791年7月17日，此处曾发生屠杀流血事件。后来法国曾经使用这个场地迎接过几次的世界博览会以及1900年的奥林匹克运动会。 游玩时间约15分钟 查看更多 埃菲尔铁塔（外观） 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。 游玩时间约15分钟 查看更多 塞纳河游船 乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。 游玩时间约1小时 查看更多

overview.text_en: In the morning, head to Paris's fashion center, Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, to freely visit the Palais Garnier (Paris Opera House) (exterior), the Printemps department store, the Galeries Lafayette and other fashion districts. In the afternoon, head to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris to tour Versailles; then return to the Place d'Italie in Paris to conclude this wonderful journey.
overview.text_zh: 上午前往前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货，巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。 下午前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫；返回巴黎意大利广场结束美好行程。

highlights.text_en: Stroll along Paris's Boulevard Haussmann. Boulevard Haussmann is not in Paris's busiest area, but it comes alive thanks to two famous department stores: France's Galeries Lafayette and Printemps, the latter known for its fine home furnishings. You can stroll alone and feel the life and atmosphere of Boulevard Haussmann; or go with a few friends, walking along Boulevard Haussmann and enjoying the delight of shopping. Sights and activities. Palace of Versailles: the Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of the historical period of French feudal rule. In substance it was not only the French court, but also the country's administrative center, and the concrete embodiment of the political views and lifestyle of French society at the time. It represents the power of an absolutist regime able to concentrate such enormous manpower, material resources and finances, unseen in Europe since the ancient Roman Empire. At the time, to build it, Louis XIV mobilized more than thirty thousand workers as well as architects, engineers and technicians; besides solving the complex technical problems arising from constructing a large-scale building complex, they also had to solve problems of water supply, roads and other matters. It can be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully proves the progress of France's economy and technology at the time and the wisdom of the working people. Visit time about 1 hour 30 minutes. See more. Boulevard Haussmann: Boulevard Haussmann lies between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On the street are the two major department stores, the Galeries Lafayette and Printemps of Paris. Marcel Proust, author of 'In Search of Lost Time,' completed most of the writing of that work in his residence at No. 102 on this street. Visit time about 3 hours. See more. Palais Garnier (Paris Opera House) (exterior): the Paris Opera House was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861; its architecture perfectly combines several architectural forms such as ancient Greco-Roman colonnades and the Baroque, grand in scale, exquisitely detailed and resplendent. It is hailed as a theater where painting, marble and gold ornamentation shine upon one another, giving great enjoyment, and is one of the typical buildings of Napoleon III's era. Visit time about 15 minutes. See more. Cost description. Cost includes: 1. [Hotels]: 9 nights in four-star hotels; 2. [Meals]: 9 meals in total, in-hotel breakfasts or other forms of dining; 3. [Taxes and fees]: tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees and all other taxes and fees within the itinerary; 4. [Transport]: tour coach or business travel vehicle; 5. [Guide]: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for 8 people or fewer, a business travel vehicle + Chinese-speaking driver-guide will be arranged); 6. Extended stays: accommodation, transport and sightseeing costs for stays extended beyond the itinerary; 8. Personal expenses: such as beverages and alcohol, taxis.
highlights.text_zh: 漫步巴黎奥斯曼大街 奥斯曼大街不在巴黎繁华的区域内，却因为2幢著名的百货公司而生动起来：法国的百货公司———老佛爷百货(GaleriesLafayette)及以家饰精品著称的春天百货(Printemps)。你可以独自漫步，感受奥斯曼大道的生活气息；也可以与三五好友一起，穿行在奥斯曼大街上，享受购物的欣喜。 景点活动 凡尔赛宫 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。 游玩时间约1小时30分钟 查看更多 奥斯曼大街 奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间。街上有巴黎老佛爷百货公司和春天百货两大百货公司。《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里，完成了《追忆似水年华》的大部分写作。 游玩时间约3小时 查看更多 巴黎歌剧院（外观） 巴黎歌剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受，是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。 游玩时间约15分钟 查看更多 费用说明 费用包含 1.【酒店】： 四星级酒店9晚； 2.【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计9餐； 3.【税费】： 游客城市税，进城费，居住税，路桥费，登岛费等行程内的所有税费； 4.【交通】： 旅游巴士或者商务旅行车； 5.【导游】： 职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车车+中文司机兼导游）； 6.【行李】： 1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李； 7.【活动及门票】：威尼斯登岛轮渡、五渔村景观列车、塞纳河游船、卢浮宫门票（含国家馆讲解师）、凡尔赛门票（含国家馆讲解师）。 费用不包含 1.护照：个人护照费用 ； 2.签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用； 3.保险：旅游保险费用；（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）； 4.小费： 游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价 ； 5.餐饮：行程内不包含午、晚正餐费用； 6.门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括，但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）； 7.延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用； 8.私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of the historical period of French feudal rule. In substance it was not only the French court, but also the country's administrative center, and the concrete embodiment of the political views and lifestyle of French society at the time. It represents the power of an absolutist regime able to concentrate such enormous manpower, material resources and finances, unseen in Europe since the ancient Roman Empire. At the time, to build it, Louis XIV mobilized more than thirty thousand workers as well as architects, engineers and technicians; besides solving the complex technical problems arising from constructing a large-scale building complex, they also had to solve problems of water supply, roads and other matters. It can be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully proves the progress of France's economy and technology at the time and the wisdom of the working people.

attractions.text_en: Boulevard Haussmann lies between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On the street are the two major department stores, the Galeries Lafayette and Printemps of Paris. Marcel Proust, author of 'In Search of Lost Time,' completed most of the writing of that work in his residence at No. 102 on this street.
